title: ononis alopecuroides var. baetica
intro: Ononis alopecuroides var. baetica is a plant species, also known as Baetic restharrow, which belongs to the legume family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Baetic restharrow include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Baetic restharrow can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
